basic_details.job_title: CSIR CGCRI Project Associate Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: CSIR Central Glass And Ceramic Research Institute
basic_details.short_information: CSIR Central Glass And Ceramic Research Institute (CSIR CGCRI) Project Associate I Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of CSIR CGCRI. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the CSIR CGCRI Project Associate I Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years Age relaxation is applicable as per rules: Upto 5 years for SC/ST/Physically Handicapped and Female candidates, and 3 years for OBC (Non-Creamy layer) candidates.

qualification.education_qualification: M.Sc. in Chemistry (Physical or Inorganic in specialization) / Materials Science / Nanoscience from a recognised university, B.E. / B.Tech in Ceramic / Metallurgy & Materials Engineering / Material Science / Nanoscience and Technology / Chemical Engineering from a recognized university or equivalent.
qualification.details: M.Sc. in Chemistry (Physical or Inorganic in specialization) / Materials Science / Nanoscience from a recognised university. B.E. / B.Tech in Ceramic / Metallurgy & Materials Engineering / Material Science / Nanoscience and Technology / Chemical Engineering from a recognized university or equivalent.

salary_details.details: Rs.31,000/- + HRA as admissible p.m. or Rs.25,000/- + HRA as admissible p.m.

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 11-06-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the CSIR CGCRI Project Associate - I recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email is 11th June 2026. Ensure your application reaches the institute before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the selection process for the Project Associate - I position?
faq.answer: The selection process involves a Walk-in Interview followed by Document Verification. Candidates are advised to be prepared for both stages.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Project Associate - I post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Project Associate - I position is 35 years. Age relaxations are applicable for reserved categories as per government norms.

faq.question: Q4. What are the educational qualifications required for this post?
faq.answer: Candidates must have an M.Sc. in Chemistry, Materials Science, or Nanoscience, or a B.E./B.Tech in relevant engineering disciplines from a recognized university.

faq.question: Q5. How should I apply for the CSIR CGCRI Project Associate - I position?
faq.answer: Applications should be submitted via email. Ensure all required documents are attached and the subject line clearly states the post applied for.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC/SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the salary offered for the Project Associate - I role?
faq.answer: The salary offered ranges from Rs. 25,000 to Rs. 31,000 per month, plus HRA as admissible.

faq.question: Q8. Where will the Walk-in Interview be conducted?
faq.answer: The Walk-in Interview will be conducted at CSIR Central Glass And Ceramic Research Institute, Kolkata, West Bengal. Specific venue details will be in the official notification.

faq.question: Q9. What documents do I need to submit with my application?
faq.answer: You need to submit self-attested copies of educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs along with your application.

faq.question: Q10. Is this a permanent government job?
faq.answer: No, this is a contractual position. The recruitment is for Project Associate - I on a contractual basis.
